hero.tagline: An unofficial GitHub Desktop powering your work.
hero.subtitle: A modern, minimalist desktop app where every entry point lives in the sidebar — use every GitHub feature seamlessly, with no constant page reloads or new tabs.

overview.title: A clean, powerful overview
overview.description: Every feature is one click away in the sidebar: no new tabs, no reloads, no waiting for pages to load. Open the app and see your whole repository at a glance.

lists.title: Silky-smooth lists
lists.description: Browse Pull Requests, Issues, and Actions at a glance. Filter, open, and act in one fluid motion — every interaction feels instant.

preview.title: Instant previews in the right panel
preview.description: Preview any file without leaving where you are: source code, rich content, and full diffs render right in the panel — review a PR's changes at a glance.

actions.title: Actions, live
actions.description: Follow every workflow run in real time: job progress, step status, and full logs stream in as they happen — no refreshing required.

bookmarks.title: Bookmark anything
bookmarks.description: Pin any page to your sidebar bookmarks, so the repos, PRs, and views you care about are always one click away.

customization.title: Make it yours
customization.description: Pick from a range of themes and styles, then go further with custom fonts and code block styling — until it looks exactly the way you like.

accounts.title: Switch accounts in a snap
accounts.description: Sign in with multiple GitHub accounts and jump between them instantly — work and personal, always within reach.
